text: 111 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «أَرْبَعٌ مِنْ سُنَنِ اَلْمُرْسَلِينَ اَلتَّعَطُّرُ وَ اَلسِّوَاكُ وَ اَلنِّسَاءُ وَ اَلْحِنَّاءُ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.111 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Four practices are from the traditions of the messengers: applying fragrance, using siwak (toothstick), having relations with women, and using henna."
